title: psacaliopsis macdonaldii
intro: Psacaliopsis macdonaldii, also known as Mexican prickly poppy or Macdonald's poppy, is a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties due to its alkaloid content, which includes macdanielline, a compound that has been shown to have analgesic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Psacaliopsis macdonaldii include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its use as a treatment for fever and other conditions. Herbal preparations of Psacaliopsis macdonaldii can be made by drying the plant's leaves and flowers, then infusing them in hot water to create a tea.
